testsuite.name: tests.PIMTest

testcase.name: TC_PIM_061

failure.message: Personal Details page should be displayed after saving new employee expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Personal Details page should be displayed after saving new employee expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.system-out: TC_PIM_061 - Verify user can add new record in PIM module

testcase.name: TC_PIM_062
testcase.system-out: TC_PIM_062 - Verify user can edit existing record in PIM module TC_PIM_062 - PASSED: Existing employee record edited successfully

testcase.name: TC_PIM_063
testcase.system-out: TC_PIM_063 - Verify user can delete record in PIM module TC_PIM_063 - PASSED: Employee record deleted successfully

testcase.name: TC_PIM_064

testcase.system-out: TC_PIM_064 - Verify user can search records in PIM module

testsuite.system-out: TC_PIM_061 - Verify user can add new record in PIM module TC_PIM_062 - Verify user can edit existing record in PIM module TC_PIM_062 - PASSED: Existing employee record edited successfully TC_PIM_063 - Verify user can delete record in PIM module TC_PIM_063 - PASSED: Employee record deleted successfully TC_PIM_064 - Verify user can search records in PIM module
